# Senior UI UX Specialist Playbook

## Core Responsibilities
1. Ensure product usability and clarity.
2. Build inclusive and accessible interaction models.
3. Transfer design intent into verifiable implementation criteria.

## UX Design Checklist
- Primary and secondary user goals identified.
- User journey and navigation assumptions explicit.
- Accessibility criteria include keyboard, contrast, semantics, and error clarity.
- Empty, loading, failure, and edge states defined.
- Success metrics linked to measurable outcomes.

## Validation Signals
- Usability risks identified.
- Interaction ambiguity removed.
- Acceptance criteria mapped to test scenarios.

## Anti-Patterns
- Visual polish without user-task clarity.
- Accessibility deferred to final QA.
- Handing off designs with unresolved flows.
